calendar.matters:
MOTION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE /Notice Of Motion And Motion For Writ Of Administrative Mandate
Off Calendar Aug-27-2025 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Marianne Armenta, Esq. 415-289-5069 Open Door Legal for Petitioner
Angela Atwal, Esq. 559-705-2333 916-712-0215 angela.atwal@doj.ca.gov Office of the Attorney General for Respondent.

ARGUED. Ms. Arments contests the court's tentative ruling and presents arguments. Ms. Atwal request the TR be adopted. After full arguments, the Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER XAVIER GONSALEZ' Motion For Writ Of Administrative Mandate.

Petitioner Xavier Gonsalez's petition for writ of administrative mandamus is denied.

(see word minutes for full details)

Order is signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

MOTION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE /Notice Of Motion And Motion For Writ Of Administrative Mandate
Off Calendar Jul-07-2025 Continued To Aug-27-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
